summary:
DIVINE VISIONS AND FOCUS ON THE YOUTH: Brandon shares visions of the Lord actively seeking out lost individuals, emphasizing the biblical concept of leaving the ninety-nine to find the one. Brandon notes a specific divine focus on the youth of the current generation, predicting an upcoming movement of the Holy Spirit characterized by unprecedented demonstrations and manifestations of glory. He highlights the profound individual love and specific plans the Lord has for every person despite the vast global population.

PROPHETIC MECHANISMS AND INTERCESSORY PRAYER: Brandon explains his method of receiving prophetic insights, which heavily involves praying in the Spirit, praying in tongues, and experiencing open-eyed visions even during mundane activities like driving. He attributes past prophecies regarding a red wave, XRP, wars, plagues, and an incident involving Donald Trump and his ear to these intense periods of private intercessory prayer. He emphasizes the frequent practice of taking communion, referencing Billy Burke, and adopting a watchman role rather than claiming a traditional prophetic gift.

GEOPOLITICAL REVELATIONS AND MILITARY THREATS: Brandon recounts specific visions concerning international and geopolitical events. He describes seeing the word Sooners in an arch, which he connects to Japan and South Korea. Furthermore, Brandon mentions receiving insights about Iraq, specifically foreseeing military bases becoming targets for war. He actively prays against these attacks and intercedes for the protection of service members against threats from the Houthis, while also mentioning visions involving Kim Jong-un, troop movements via train, and escalating wars.

DOMESTIC POLITICS AND LEADERSHIP: Brandon discusses internal threats to the United States government, specifically referencing individuals he describes as rats in the White House attempting to sabotage the nation. He details his prayers for the exposure and removal of these individuals alongside angelic warfare. Additionally, Brandon intercedes for Donald Trump, praying for his discernment, protection from pride, and deliverance from dark influences, while also extending prayers of protection over JD Vance, Melania Trump, and their respective families. He calls for a radical spiritual movement among Congress, the Senate, and judges.

FINANCIAL SHIFT AND NATIONAL AWAKENING: Brandon speaks about a forthcoming great financial crash and a subsequent wealth transfer, noting an extended season of grace resulting from prayers made in October. He anticipates a significant shaking to awaken in America, designed to disrupt complacency and humble the nation. Brandon aligns this upcoming period with a massive spiritual outpouring, comparing the current generation of believers to closers who will surpass the revivals of past figures like Kenneth Hagin, Oral Roberts, Kathryn Kuhlman, and Billy Graham.

HEALING AND FAMILY RESTORATION: Brandon focuses on the restoration of families and personal breakthroughs. He declares the return of wayward children and the salvation of unsaved spouses, urging believers to act in faith as though their miracles have already occurred. Brandon mentions specific anticipated breakthroughs, including physical healings, pregnancies for those struggling with infertility, and financial provision, repeatedly emphasizing the importance of maintaining an atmosphere of thanksgiving and praising in advance of the manifestation. He also notes a specific emphasis on the upcoming Easter season as a time of major significance.
rawData: [March 26, 2025]-[Let your thanksgiving outweigh your request - Philippians 4:6]-[https://youtu.be/nDqOltb-P14]-[Hey, good morning family. Thank you for joining me today. It's just me today, but I'm excited to be here, and I pray you are too. Yesterday, when Diana and I were praying over the things the Lord had for us, it was over the top. The presence of the Lord was tangible in this house. The Lord showed me again one last call; His eyes were looking over the horizon at the sheep that were lost. He would leave the 99 and go after the one. I could see Him longing for His lost child, the lost ones, the wayward people in the backfields. He's coming for you. I believe even Braden loved it when the Lord said, "The devil came at the youth hard, but I'm going to come at them harder. I'm coming for the youth of this generation." He said, "I'm coming back for a glorious church," but man, what the Lord has in store for the youth! I believe we're about to see some of the greatest moves of the Spirit of the Lord we've ever seen before—demonstrations and manifestations of the glory of God. I know the Bible says there's a great falling away. I understand that, but I know what He also said to me. He said, "Brandon, I'm coming for the one." Do you realize how much Jesus loves you today? Do you realize how much He has a plan for your life? Every single one of you, He loves. When we go through a major city and I see all the people, I think, "Isn't it amazing that He has interest in every single one of us?" There are millions and billions of us. There are only 300-some million people in the United States; around the world, there are billions. Think about that. He has a plan, and He knows every hair on your head. He knows your past, He knows your future, and He knows everything about you. He knows the day you're going to take your last breath, but He wants every one of you to know Him. That's exciting. It's overwhelming to me to think that He has a plan for every single one of us and that He knows us all that well. He knows all our faults and our pains; He knows what you're bad at and what you're good at. It's amazing. God is a good God. I was excited. A lot of people say, "What does Sooner mean?" or "What did you see, Sooner?" I believe it is a representation of the land run. If you look at what the Sooners do—the same reason why they named the college the Oklahoma Sooners—He highlighted "Sooners" in an arch before me. He was talking about Japan and South Korea, and I thought that was interesting because He highlighted that to me. People say, "How do you see all this? Oh, you just have a great imagination, Brandon." I'm not that good, I'll be real with y'all. If you realized who is talking to you behind the camera, you would go, "Wow." Seriously, I think it's amazing the things the Lord will show us in prayer if you seek Him. When He talked about Iraq again, people say, "Well, are you talking about the revaluation of the Iraqi dinar?" I have no idea. When I'm in the Spirit like that and saying what I'm seeing, I don't remember a lot of what I'm saying because I'm flowing with the Holy Ghost. So my son and my wife will say, "This is what you said," because Diana or Braden takes notes of everything the Lord shows me whenever I'm praying; that's what we do in our private time. We're just doing more private time in public view so people can see us and how the Lord flows. This is what we do on a day-to-day basis. This is how serious we take it. The Holy Spirit visits us like this all the time. I'm not bragging; it's just real. He will show us that which is to come. This is how the Trump ear prophecy came out. This is how saying there would be a red wave or XRP, and all these things He's showing me about wars and the plague—it is all birthed out of prayer. I don't just walk around and get these prophetic words. I told you, I don't feel like I walk in a prophetic gift; I'm a watchman. It's totally different than somebody who walks around saying, "I hear the voice of the Lord." That's amazing when it happens, don't get me wrong, but I see when I pray in the Spirit, not in English. Even my kids say, "Dad prays in tongues and Dad prays a lot in tongues, and that's what we do." I get in the car and drive around, and the Lord shows me things: open-eyed visions. I don't close my eyes when I'm driving around and run into somebody! I'm praying and looking, and all of a sudden, He'll show me an open-eyed vision. I'll see things, and the Lord will show me that which is to come. I believe that's a gift. I believe God gives those gifts to intercessory prayer people—people who intercede for the nations. They intercede and are prayer people. I believe that He's no respecter of persons; what He'll do for me, He'll do for you. I say it all the time: "Father, give me eyes to see what I need to see and ears for what I need to hear." I thank You, Lord, that I am never snared by any satanic or demonic force. I thank You, Father, that no weapon formed against me will prosper, but I hear Your voice, and a stranger's voice I will not follow. I hear You, Father; You speak to me and show me that which is to come as I sit on the wall. That's what I do. I confess that over myself all the time: I hear and see what the Father wants me to see. And I take communion. I have these communion cups—we've got communion everywhere: the living room, the kitchen, the bedrooms. We have it in the car. We go before the Lord with communion all the time. We like it so much, I told y'all I'm turning purple! It's just funny to us because we say we're turning purple. Billy Burke says that: "I turn purple, I turn purple," because we take communion so much. We believe in the anointing and the power of the Holy Spirit. We believe Jesus Christ has chosen us and we are called to the kingdom for such a time as this. We're excited you're here. We're believing for a million-man and woman prayer army to pray on this channel, as He told us. He said, "Brandon, you do this and we can change the course of governments and things all around us." So we saw about that yesterday. We saw the Sooners and the things we prayed about Iraq. I told you about the attacks; I said we're praying against attacks against our bases—our army bases and naval bases in Iraq. I'm not familiar with them, but I saw bases being targets for war. So we pray against that and for the Houthis, that they will not be able to hurt any of our service people, that they're always in the right place at the right time, and no weapon formed against them will prosper. We pray over that. I've prayed over what the Lord showed me about Kim Jong-un, the troops going over in the train, and the war trying to escalate. I see it. Then we were praying over... there was a lot. We had our list, but I thought, "Well, what's fresh today?" If the Lord shows us something today, cool. If he doesn't, I always go with anticipation that God is going to show up and show off and show us what he wants us to see. So, we pray you're excited. We pray you want to be a part of this. And let's just get started. So, we always take communion to start off. I always enter by the blood of the Lamb, by the word of our testimony. Thank you, Father, for all that you've done. Thank you, Father, for all that you've done for us. I thank you, God, that you set us free by the blood. You said you were wounded for our transgressions. You were bruised for our iniquities. The chastisement of our peace was upon you. And with your stripes, we are healed. And Father, we thank you, Lord, for your body that was broken for us today. And we take this body and we thank you, Lord, that by your stripes, we are healed. And we take it right now in the name of Jesus. And we are healed from the top of our head to the soles of our feet. And we're expecting the manifestation of what we've been believing for now in Jesus' name. Father, we thank you, Lord, that we're delivered. We're delivered from all bondage. We're delivered in Jesus' name. And we thank you, Father, for it. Lord, we plead the blood of Jesus over us. You said in your word, if we confess our sin, you're faithful and just to forgive us of our sin and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. And we plead the blood of Jesus over us today, God. And we thank you, Lord, for we make much of the blood, and the blood will make much of us. And we plead the blood of Jesus Christ over us today. And we thank you, Father, that it is well with us in our soul. And we come up higher with the fire. And we see from an eagle's eye, not down on the lower level, but Father, we come up higher with you on the higher level, seated with you in the heavenlies. And we take our seat. We take our rightful place with you right now in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that you're making intercession for us at the right hand of the Father. And we take this blood right now and we plead the blood of Jesus Christ over us. And we thank you, Father, that what you bore in your body, we don't have to bear in our own. We're healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Father, for all that you've done for us. Thank you for your blood. Thank you, Lord, for what you've done. Glory to your name, Lord. We're expecting and we'll be used by you. We'll be filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost because we say yes. Just like yesterday, he said, 'Who will say yes?' We say yes. We say yes today, Lord. In Jesus' name. Lord, we thank you. The news is saying there's a rat in the White House. I've heard that before. Lord, you warned us about the rat. You warned us about the people trying to sabotage and do the things that they're trying to do. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that the rats are found and caught in the cages that they need to be in. I thank you, Father, that you're exposing the rats. You're exposing the people that I've seen that are trying to bring down this government. Father, your angels are going before us and they're preparing the way. I send them out right now in the name of Jesus from the north, the south, the east, the west. We call our angels, Father, to war on our behalf today. We thank you, Lord, that your warring angel armies are warring on our behalf. Father, you said we will work with them. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that we will work with them and we commission them to go forth now in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that they are bearing us up in their hands lest we dash our foot against a stone. And I pray over President Trump right now in the name of Jesus that he has great discernment. And Father, he will hear you even in the midnight hour of knowing who to put around him, God, that he would know who are the rats and who is there to be trusted, Father. That he'll not be snared by his own pride or anything of the flesh; that he would hear you, God. He would be humbled before you, Father. That he would humble himself underneath the mighty hand. And in due time, he will be exalted. And Lord, he's been exalted into his position of authority over America. So Father, I thank you, Lord, that you protect our leader, that you undergird him, Father, that he would have the wisdom to lead this great nation back to victory, Father, delivering us out of the hand of the evil. That Father, he is delivered out of the hand of the darkness, that he is not being influenced by any satanic or demonic force. I thank you, Lord, for JD Vance, his wife, and his children, and over President Trump, his children, and Melania. I pray a hedge of protection around every single one of them. Father, I thank you, Lord, for our leaders in Congress and our House, that there will be a radical move of the presence of the Lord, a radical move of the Lord on the Senate and the House floor. That we will have revival. So, Father, we thank you, Lord, for every judge and every person that's represented in the Congress and in the Senate. Father, I pray over them right now in the name of Jesus for making godly laws, that there'll be a supernatural hand of the Holy Ghost on our nation once again for one last call. Father, I thank you, Lord. I know that you showed me a great financial crash, but Lord, you said to me, 'Brandon, what the prayers prayed in October, the things that were prayed in October, I'm giving you extended time. I'm giving you a season of grace for a great wealth transfer will come on the ones that are listening, on the 1%. And as they hear me, they will be provided for.' There will be a great shaking to awaken over America, for they will be humbled. America will be humbled in the days ahead. When, I don't know, but Lord, you said it was coming. But I know that we will not be caught off guard. It's not for us to be caught off guard. Father, we pray mercy. Just like Abraham interceded on behalf of Sodom and Gomorrah, we intercede on behalf of America. And Father, we don't want to not have a shaking to awaken because Father, to keep going down the same road and wanting different results is insanity. You have to have something to change it. And we thank you, Lord, that there's a changing of the tide. There's a changing of circumstances to shake the people out of the slumber. And Father, I thank you, Lord, it's not just for the body of Christ, but Father, the ones in the back field, to shake them out of their slumber. And what more to do it, Father, than you? You'll do this. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that this is a time like we've never seen before for the greatest outpouring, the greatest radical outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord, more than what we've ever seen before on this earth, more than any time, more than any other place all throughout eternity. Father, we've come to this time, the end of the end. And Father, we were born in this time. And Father, you've called us for this time. And Father, I thank you that we please you. You say, 'Well done, thy good and faithful servant. Go and enter into my rest.' Thank you, Lord, that that's who we are. We will be the ones that close this thing up. We're the closers. Every single one of us right now that are born into this generation are closers. And we will be the closers. It wasn't brother Hagin. It wasn't Oral Roberts. It wasn't Kathryn Kuhlman. It was us. You called us for now. They were the generation before the end of all. And now you've called us, Lord, and we're going to finish the race. They passed the baton, and as they pass the baton, we're running with the relay race baton. And we're running and we're going to finish that way. We see the finish line ahead of us, Lord, and we want to finish strong. We want to live long and finish strong. We want to finish the race with great victory and not just barely passing by over that finish line going, "Well, we made it." No, we go running and we break records. We're barrier breakers. We have a barrier breaker anointing on the inside of us and a barrier breaker mentality. We don't have a "just give up, barely getting by" mentality. We have a mentality of saying we can do all things through Christ who strengthens us. We can do all things, for you've given us strength and a hope. I believe, Father, that we'll be the barrier breakers. Where Billy Graham went and saved hundreds of thousands in a meeting, Father, it will be more on us: the greater anointing, a greater capacity, a greater revelation of your word. Father, I thank you, Lord, for supernatural wisdom concerning the word of God, that we would have an anointing of knowing how to teach and preach the word in a way that no generation has ever done before. I thank you, Father, that this is a time that we soar. We're coming up higher with the fire, Father. It'll be just like Moses; if you would do that for Moses in the old covenant, how much more will you do it for us in the new covenant? How much more, if you would do that for Elijah and Elisha, Father, how much more will you do it for us? We have a new covenant with new promises and the blood of Jesus. We believe, Father, that we receive the greater impartation that we've never seen on this earth before. Father, it would be on the sons and the daughters. You said in your word that you're going to pour out your spirit upon all flesh and your sons and your daughters will prophesy. And I believe that we're that generation that's closing it up, Father, just like you said last night, who will say yes. And Father, we will say yes. We will say yes to you, Father. We will seek you and we will find you. We will knock and the door will be opened unto us. You said, "Give, and it shall be given unto us: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give into our bosom." Father, I pray over every single person who has seed in the ground. Father, that their seed will multiply: some thirty, some sixty, and hundredfold. Father, we're thankful for the thirty and we're thankful for the sixty, but God, we're believing for the overflow. And overflow comes out of hundredfold ground. And I thank you, Lord, that we put our seed in hundredfold ground and we get forth that hundredfold harvest quickly—multiplication quickly in the name of Jesus. We break the bonds of poverty and all the lack and "not enough" and "barely getting by." We take authority over it in the name of Jesus and we break it off of our households. Father, that whatever we put our hands to will prosper in the name of Jesus. Father, that we'll have exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. Father, this is not a time to shrink back, but it's a time to grab hold and take over the land. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we're taking the land just like Joshua and Caleb did; we're not going to be grasshoppers or be the size of grasshoppers to the giants. No! Who is that uncircumcised Philistine that he will try to defy the armies of the living God? We're going to take back the land and we're going to take it back strong. And we're going to take it back with all we've got, not being afraid of the terror of the night nor for the arrow that flieth by day. Father, we thank you, Lord, that we're taking our dominion and our authority, and we're going into all the world and we're preaching the gospel throughout the whole world. And you said when this gospel is preached throughout the whole world, then the end would come. I believe that, Father, we are called to preach the gospel throughout the whole world. And we're raising up our prayer force. We're raising up an army of great believers on this platform, and they're going—from Africa, Asia, South America, and all over Europe. Father, I thank you, Lord, that there'll be a great harvest of souls come through this channel and we will touch this generation one more time for you, Jesus. We'll do it. We're not going to shy back and be afraid. We're not going to be intimidated by what they think about us. We don't care about what they think about us; we only care about what you think about us. And you said, "Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health even as your soul prospers." You said you have a great future for us and an expected end. Father, it's never for us to go just barely getting by; it's to have the overflow. Not just about finances, but the glory. The glorious church will rise without spot or wrinkle in these last days. Like Tommy Hicks' vision said, when the giant points his finger at us, we don't shrink back and say no. We say, "Yes Lord, here am I. Yes Lord, here are we. Send us." When he put the fire from the altar on his lips: "Here am I, Lord, send me." I thank you, Lord. It's just like a fire shut up in my bones—a Holy Ghost fire shut up in my bones. I believe there's fire on the inside of me, burning and keeping me alive, stirring me up. And there's a new wine and new wine skin. And every one of us that has been dry and every one of us that is lacking a fresh water and a drink today, we call them stirred up in the name of Jesus. We break out of that pit of despair, the pit of hopelessness and "barely getting by" spiritually. It's time to thrive in '25. It's time to thrive spiritually in 2025. Get up and shake off that old beggar's cloak and get off of that old "barely getting by, always broke" mentality and say, "God, I'm going to do something big for you today." We're going to do something big for Jesus. Father, when we get on the other side, you will see the vast fruit of what we did for you. We want to bring in the millions, the tens of millions. Oh Lord, use us once again. Oh Lord, use us with the fire again. Oh Lord, stir us once again. We need your fire, Lord. We need the glory, Lord. We thank you, Lord, for the presence of the Lord on our lives, that when we walk into places they see the glory of the Lord on our faces. They see it and they say, "What's different about them?" And it's Jesus. So God, we give you praise and glory and honor for it right now in the name of Jesus. We thank you, Lord, that all hidden things are being revealed. We thank you, Lord, for the finances for all the things you said. We seek you, God, and when we seek you, you said we find you. We knock and the door will be opened unto us. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Jesus. We call all the wayward children home. We call the blinders off of their eyes right now in the name of Jesus. For you said in your word that Satan has blinded the eyes of the unbeliever. Father, we're calling those blinders to be lifted off of their eyes and that they have the eyes to see what the spirit of the Lord is saying. We call their eyes to open in the name of Jesus. We call a supernatural eye-opening experience of the fire and the presence of the Lord like we've never seen before. We believe, Father, according to Ephesians 1, that the eyes of their understanding would be enlightened. Father, they would know how much you love them. Lord, Father, we thank you that the wayward ones haven't talked to their moms. They haven't talked to their dad. They haven't wanted to have anything to do with the family in so long. Father, we're bringing them back in. Thank you, Lord, that whatever it is—they're out on drugs or doing something bad—they're coming home in Jesus' name. Thank you, Lord, that they're coming home. We call forth the husbands and the wives to be born again. We call for supernatural manifestations in houses so that they will know the salvation of the Lord. They will have a saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ. I believe, Father, that the husbands and the wives are coming and being born again right now. Father, we call those wayward people home right now in Jesus' name. Someone may say, "Well, I can't live this way anymore." Father, I thank you that you give the other ones strength. The husband or the wife who is born again is praying for their unsaved loved ones. Father, you give them strength. I thank you, Lord, that they walk in the full manifestations of the glory: love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, and self-control. Father, I thank you. We praise you, Father. Now, Father, I just need to pray over our pastors. We call forth a revival in our churches. We call forth a stirring over our pastors like we've never seen before. We're calling in those pastors right now in the name of Jesus to be stirred up. Father, let them not be intimidated by a sister who says, "Well, she won't give her money if I preach this way." Father, let there not be any intimidation or a spirit of control on our ministers. Let them flow freely with the presence of the Lord like we've never seen before. Raise up a new generation if they do not—a generation of Davids who will go after and slay the giants. Father, I thank you that we are not going to shrink back, but we will take the land. Father, it starts in the house of the Lord first, for you said judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. So we thank you that you're cleaning house. You're exposing the darkness. Father, I thank you that you're exposing the darkness. I thank you, Lord. There's a fresh fire in the building, the altar. There's fresh fire at the church. There's fresh fire, Father. So we're going to pray in the spirit now. That was for the English speakers because so many people say, "I don't speak in tongues. I don't understand what you're saying. It's hard for me to enter in." So I prayed for the ones who want to pray in English so you can pray with me. But I'm going to jump in the river now for a minute and we're going to pray and see if the Lord wants to show us anything. I want to be polite because I have all kinds of different believers on our platform here. We're thankful for every single one of you from all kinds of denominations and backgrounds. A lot of you don't understand it, but I'm thankful that every one of you shows up because you're hungry. Thank you. We're going to jump in the river now. If you want to, you can click out now. If not, and you want to stick around and keep listening, I believe the Lord shows us things. And so we're going to pray in tongues for a little bit. Holy Spirit, I yield to you. I thank you, Lord, that you speak through me. You speak and you show me that which is to come. I sit on the wall, Lord; we come up higher and we do the dance. You lead and I will follow. Holy Spirit, we thank you that you forgive us of our sins. We've already done that with communion, but I always do it to make sure my heart is clear before you. I thank you, Lord, that you speak through me boldly in the name of Jesus. I yield. We trust you, Lord. We worship you, Lord. We don't take any of it for granted. We humble ourselves before you, Father. We thank you, Lord, for what a plan—oh, what a planner. I hear you. He said, "Come before me with thanksgiving. Thank me for what I'm about to do in your life." Thank him! Do you hear what he said? He said, "Act it out in faith," is what I just heard him say about what I'm about to do in your life. Act like you've already got it. How would you act if somebody just wrote you a check for a million dollars and handed it to you? How would you act if you just got your breakthrough of your unsaved loved one coming in? How would you act if you just got your healing that you've been believing for? What would you do if you just received it? What would you be doing right now? I heard him say that to me. He said, "What would you be doing instead of praying right now? What would you do if you got your breakthrough? How would you praise me? What would you do, Brandon?" I heard him say it when I was praying. And that's what he said to tell you all to demonstrate this right now. So, Father, we give you praise and glory and honor and we shout the victory. Thank you, Lord, for all that you've done. Thank you, Lord, for how much you've provided. Thank you, Lord, that you're the God of the breakthrough. Hallelujah. We give you praise and glory and honor. Thank you, Jesus, for the healings. Thank you, Lord, for your deliverance. Thank you for Megan's healing. Glory to God. Thank you for the victory. Thank you, Lord, for all that you've provided. Thank you, Lord, for your finances. Glory to God. Thank you for how good you've been to us. Thank you that you would want to visit us, Lord. Glory to God. We shout the victory. We give you praise and glory and honor and majesty. You are good and your mercy endures forever. Thank you, Jesus, for the breakthrough. Father, we will not allow the rocks to cry out. We'll not allow them to do our job. We give you glory, honor, and praise, for you are good and your mercy endures forever. Great is your faithfulness to us, oh God. Glory to God. We shout the victory. We shout the praise. You are good. You are wonderful. You are holy. You are mighty. Oh Lord, we praise you for all that you've done. Glory to God for the breakthrough. Oh God, we praise you. Thank you, Father. We give you praise and glory for it. Everybody shout the victory! Shout the triumph just like they did when they walked around the walls of Jericho seven times. Then they gave the shout of praise and the walls began to shake and they fell to the ground. He's delivered the land to us. We shout the victory just like the walls of Jericho. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Jesus. Hallelujah. Father, I thank you that the praises outmatch our prayers. Glory to God. Thank you, Jesus. Hallelujah. Well, we had a praise break. That's what he said to do, so we just had a praise break. That was fun. I strained my voice. Thank you, Father. I believe it. He inhabits the praises of his people today. He inhabits the praises of his people. He said, 'Act it out by faith, whatever you're believing me for. Act it out by faith that you've already got it.' How would you act if you already received it today? You're not begging; we're believing. And what the believers already believed, we received.
